    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected final void
    Transformation.attach(ArrayInitializer child, NewArray parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node and reports this if necessary.
    protected final void
    Transformation.attachAsArgument(Expression child, NewArray parent, int index)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node at a given index and reports this if necessary.
    static void
    Transformation.doAttach(ArrayInitializer child, NewArray parent)
    Attaches a child node to a parent node but does not report this.
